groups.label: Console grouping lifecycle tokens
groups.description: groupCollapsed / groupEnd / dir-undefined entries from the Capacitor bridge — visual DevTools formatting wrappers with zero information content in a flat log file.

groups.label: Duplicate console source shadow entries
groups.description: Every web-layer log fires twice: once via source=shim (rich, stack-traced) and once via source=console (raw CDP). Removing the console duplicates leaves the shim copies intact.

groups.label: __DUMPLOGS__ native re-echoes
groups.description: Android native logger re-emits every web console message already fully captured by the shim. Identifiable by the __DUMPLOGS__ prefix in the native debug message.

groups.label: Per-cookie verbose confirmation logs
groups.description: Individual per-key acknowledgments from CookieService (setCookie ok, cookie: name=, native cookie: key=). Summary-level logs already capture the outcome; these per-entry lines are noise during normal operation.

groups.label: Android OS / platform system noise
groups.description: Native log entries from Android system components unrelated to app behaviour: input method framework (AGTM), satellite radio stack, WiFi interface manager, stylus events, clipboard suggestions, ART dex optimisation, OpenGL no-ops, kernel /proc permission denials, IME keyboard helpers, and native info logs with an undefined message.
